name: access-control
description: Sistema de Control de Acceso por Sucursales

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend" --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
